case_title: PATEL, JAY JAY vs. SCOTT, GILBERT et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, GILBERT
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, GILBERT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT, GILBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 420 EDDY STREET #31, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, STAYED TILL 11:59PM 2/21/98. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE DFT TO PAY $750- BACK RENT + DAMAGES $16.67 PER DAY FROM 1/2/98 THRU 2/21/98 + $168- COSTS (TOTAL $1,600.17) MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, GILBERT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, JAY JAY AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, GILBERT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, GILBERT ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, GILBERT ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

JUDGE PRO TEM: DAN DUNCAN/CLERK:ECLAVERIA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF JAY JAY PATEL AND HIS COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT. DEFT GILBERT SCOTT APPEARED WITH HIS COUNSEL WILLIAM KRANSDORF. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT EMBODIED IN THE "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION", WHICH WAS SIGNED BY DEFT'S COUNSEL, MR. KRANSDOF. BOTH PARTIES WAIVED PRESENCE OF REPORTER - NOT ON RECORD.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, JAY JAY
